---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in repo2skill
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
```bash
repo2skill <command that failed>
```

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error output if available.

## Environment
- repo2skill version: `repo2skill --version`
- Node.js version: `node --version`
- OS:
